task_description: Fix MK's conversational quality: route acknowledgments as conversation continuations, add math/conversation intent classification before graph lookup, and simplify the forced slang personality to be more natural and direct.

verification.summary: Build succeeds with 11 warnings (all pre-existing unused field warnings, not related to our changes). All 42 tests pass with 335 assertions, 0 failures. New tests cover math arithmetic detection and 'yes' as VAGUE_RESPONSE.
